sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this NES platformer

special_mechanics.name: Flight Crystal
special_mechanics.description: One of three selectable starting crystals that increases Farron's jump height permanently

special_mechanics.name: Life Crystal
special_mechanics.description: Selectable starting crystal that increases Farron's health

special_mechanics.name: Spirit Crystal
special_mechanics.description: Selectable starting crystal that grants unlimited fireball attack

special_mechanics.name: Zap Summon
special_mechanics.description: Companion dog Zap can be summoned to damage enemies, providing offensive support

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game features selectable crystal modifiers that affect jump height and other properties, but exact numerical values are not provided in TCRF or Wikipedia sources. Level design and gameplay descriptions are qualitative only.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Conquest of the Crystal Palace
Wikipedia - Conquest of the Crystal Palace
